metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Advanced students develop professional-level photography skills through substantial project work. This course emphasizes artistic vision, sophisticated image creation, and preparation for photography careers or advanced study.
metadata.general_description: Advanced photography course for professional-level artistic practice.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced photographers create sophisticated artistic bodies of work demonstrating technical mastery and creative vision.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 photographers develop substantial projects reflecting personal artistic voice and engaging with meaningful themes.

big_ideas.statement: Professional photography integrates technical control with artistic expression and conceptual development.
big_ideas.elaboration: Advanced photographers master camera operation while developing artistic vision that guides all creative decisions.

big_ideas.statement: Sophisticated photography addresses meaningful themes and perspectives relevant to contemporary contexts.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 photographers create work exploring personal, cultural, or social themes with artistic and intellectual depth.

big_ideas.statement: Professional photography practice positions students for photography careers or advanced study.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students develop professional portfolios, networks, and skills necessary for photography careers or continued education.

competencies.raw: Create substantial photographic projects and bodies of work
i_can_statements: I can conceptualize and execute substantial photography projects
I can develop cohesive series of related images
I can maintain artistic vision across bodies of work
I can create complete photographic works ready for exhibition

competencies.raw: Master advanced camera techniques and control
i_can_statements: I can execute technically sophisticated photographs
I can make intentional technical choices serving artistic vision
I can problem-solve technical challenges
I can achieve professional technical standards

competencies.raw: Develop sophisticated post-processing and image refinement
i_can_statements: I can edit images with artistic sophistication
I can enhance and transform images creatively
I can achieve consistent aesthetic across bodies of work
I can produce professional-quality final images

competencies.raw: Explore diverse photographic approaches and genres
i_can_statements: I can work skillfully in different photographic genres
I can develop personal photographic style
I can specialize in areas of personal interest
I can experiment with innovative photographic approaches
I can conduct detailed analysis of photographic work
I can understand photography within cultural contexts
I can evaluate effectiveness of photographic communication
I can assess work against professional standards

competencies.raw: Understand professional photography practice and industry
i_can_statements: I can explain professional photography standards
I can understand photography industry and specializations
I can recognize professional excellence in photography
I can evaluate professional photographic work

competencies.raw: Reflect on artistic development and photographic voice
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my photographic growth and development
I can articulate my photographic style and approach
I can identify my unique perspective and interests
I can envision photography as lifelong practice or career

competencies.raw: Understand photography's cultural and social dimensions
i_can_statements: I can analyze photography's representation and perspective
I can understand photography's historical significance
I can recognize ethical dimensions of photography
I can engage photography's role in culture
I can prepare photographs for exhibition or publication
I can create professional presentations of my work
I can develop photo books or portfolios
I can maintain professional standards in presentation

competencies.raw: Present work and communicate photographic concepts
i_can_statements: I can present photographic work professionally
I can explain artistic and conceptual intent
I can discuss photographic series and themes
I can engage audiences with photographic work

competencies.raw: Create and maintain professional photography portfolio
i_can_statements: I can curate professional photography portfolio
I can document photographic process and thinking
I can create artist statements and project descriptions
I can maintain portfolio for professional use

competencies.raw: Communicate through photography and visual storytelling
i_can_statements: I can create photographs telling compelling stories
I can communicate meaning through photographic work
I can engage audiences with visual narratives
I can develop distinctive photographic voice

competencies.raw: Engage with diverse photographic traditions and perspectives
i_can_statements: I can study photographic work from diverse traditions
I can understand global photography practices
I can incorporate diverse perspectives respectfully
I can appreciate varied photographic approaches

competencies.raw: Explore emerging photographic technologies and practices
i_can_statements: I can stay current with evolving photography
I can experiment with new technologies and techniques
I can adapt to changing photographic landscape
I can develop innovative photographic approaches
I can build professional networks in photography
I can establish online photographic presence
I can seek mentorship and professional guidance
I can participate in photography communities

competencies.raw: Plan trajectory toward professional photography career
i_can_statements: I can identify photography career goals and specializations
I can develop plan for professional advancement
I can explore diverse photography careers
I can commit to lifelong photographic practice and growth

areas.name: Professional Photography Practice and Project Development
areas.raw: Professional Photography Practice and Project Development
topics: Conceptualization and planning of substantial projects

areas.name: Advanced Camera Operation and Composition
topics: Sophisticated use of light and shadow

areas.name: Advanced Post-Processing and Artistic Refinement
topics: Maintaining consistency across bodies of work
